organization.title: Other
organization.iban_desc: Bank account of the cooperative. Used as the creditor account in the SEPA direct debit XML file (pain.008).
organization.sepa_creditor_id_desc: Assigned by the bank when setting up the SEPA direct debit scheme (e.g. "DE98ZZZ09999999999"). Required for the pain.008 XML.
organization.sepa_creditor_name_desc: Name of the cooperative as it appears on the SEPA mandate. Embedded in every pain.008 file; max. 70 characters.
organization.sepa_creditor_bic_desc: BIC of the cooperative's house bank (e.g. "COBADEFFXXX" for Commerzbank). Required for the pain.008 XML — the bank provides this code when setting up SEPA.
organization.sepa_creditor_bic_invalid: Invalid BIC. A BIC is 8 or 11 characters and starts with 6 letters (e.g. "COBADEFFXXX").
organization.sepa_remittance_template_desc: The text members see on their bank statement.

legal_notice.title: Legal notice / Imprint
legal_notice.description: Mandatory provider details under § 5 DDG and § 18 (2) MStV. Shown on the public legal-notice page; empty fields are hidden there.
legal_notice.supervisory_board_desc: Only for cooperatives/associations with a supervisory board. Comma-separated names.
legal_notice.content_responsible_desc: Name of the person responsible under § 18 (2) MStV. Shown together with the organization's address.
legal_notice.participates_in_dispute_resolution_desc: Only enable if the organization is willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution before a consumer arbitration board. Default: no.
legal_notice.auditing_association_desc: Cooperatives only (§ 54 GenG). Full postal address, multi-line.
legal_notice.professional_association_desc: Responsible professional / accident insurance association, multi-line.
legal_notice.extra_html_desc: Rarely needed: chamber/regulated profession, supervisory authority for licensed activities, "in liquidation" notice. HTML is allowed and sanitized before display.

sepa.title: SEPA Direct Debit
sepa.description: Bank details and texts for the SEPA direct-debit collection (pain.008).
